questions.scenario: A tiny reusable web role needs tasks, defaults, a template, and a handler. Which shape is most useful?

options.text: One giant `site.yml` with every environment copied into it.
Only `handlers/main.yml` because handlers can install packages.
A role with no defaults so callers must read task internals.

questions.explanation: A small role should put each kind of artifact in a predictable place. That makes review and reuse easier.
